# Custom Agents

This repository exposes workspace-level custom agents under `.github/agents/`.

- `team-hierarchy-modifier.agent.md`
  - Purpose: modify React components to create tree-like hierarchy layouts for team or about sections
  - Intended for: UI changes that reposition founder/CEO and team members in a responsive layout with connectors, while preserving existing animations and styles

Use this file to discover the available custom agents and their high-level behavior.
